description_long: This bungalow features a single-story, elongated rectangular structure with a dark gabled roof and light-colored exterior walls. The front facade includes a covered entryway and several evenly spaced windows, while the rear side has a small, partially enclosed patio or sunroom. A detached garage with a matching roof sits adjacent to the main building, connected by a paved driveway and walkway. The property is set on a neatly trimmed green lawn with a simple, open layout and minimal landscaping. The windows and doors are accented with wood or wood-like trim, adding warmth to the modern, functional design. The overall appearance is clean, practical, and suited for suburban or residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, light walls, and a detached garage on a green lawn. Features include a covered entry, multiple windows, and a small rear patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and detached garage to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the gabled roof, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the small patio or sunroom, additional windows, and the garage set back from the main building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage in the foreground, a rear window, and the connecting driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
